title: Cobblemon Shuffled
description: Aims to fairly rebalance older and weaker Pokémon to either fit a stronger competitive niche better or for better usability in casual battles.
body:
This pack aims to provide balance changes to Pokemon in Cobblemon. Many older Pokemon have lackluster abilities, move pools, and stats. 

Rectifying this is simple: targeting the Pokemon's most miserable aspects and applying buffs. To make better in casual/competitive play. If a Pokemon has pitiful kits, it will be overhauled entirely to make them worth just a little more than the Pokeball you used.
Targeted aspects may be:

### Typing: 
- ex. Yanmega: Flying/Bug -> Bug/Dragon
### Abilities
- ex. Leafeon: Hidden ability 
  - chlorophyll -> grassy surge
### Base Stats
- ex. Spideops: 
  - hp 60 -> 90
  - def 92 -> 102
  - sp.def 86 -> 96
### Moves
- ex. Kantonian Vulpix & Ninetales
  - willowisp lvl 24 -> 10 (vulpix)
    - lvl 1 (ninetales)
  - mystical fire lvl 30 (vulpix)
  - moonblast lvl 60 (both)
